message:
test(e2e): update compliance assertions for expanded airtable and figma operations

Update expected operation counts in compliance E2E tests to reflect
newly added connector capabilities:

- Airtable: add list_tables, get_table, list_fields to read-ops check;
  expected op count 10 -> 13
- Figma: add figma.list_team_projects, figma.list_project_files,
  figma.get_file_meta, figma.styles.list, figma.tokens.export to safe
  ops; expected op count 12 -> 17

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
